title: Check initialization of all memory ports

features.name: memory write data port driven by conditional expression with undefined enable
features.description: Code should include a memory write data port driven by a conditional expression where the enable condition can be false/undefined, causing the data to default to 'x'

features.name: multiport memory with read_write port and conditional write
features.description: Code should include a memory module with read, write, and readwrite ports where the write port data uses a conditional that can yield undefined
